disambiguation_rules.department of commerce: Explicitly named as parent organization for the Office of Manufacturing Security and Resilience

oddities.note: The document refers to both 'Office of Manufacturing Security and Resilience' (in SEC. 4(a)) and 'Office of Supply Chain Resiliency and Crisis Response' (in SEC. 4(c)(1)) for the same office's leadership role. The Under Secretary title specifies 'Supply Chain Resiliency and Crisis Response' while the established office is named 'Manufacturing Security and Resilience'—these may be variant names or indicate structural ambiguity in the legislation.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Explicitly named as parent organization for the Office of Manufacturing Security and Resilience
